tests.name: coordination is spec only
tests.expected: Both review JSON files contain decision APPROVE_SPEC_ONLY.

tests.name: unsupported capabilities are labeled
tests.expected: CLI install, real browser Shield Pill/plugin, readiness checks 5-12, and generated GitHub Action are marked PLACEHOLDER or ROADMAP.

tests.name: secondary breadth wording is safe
tests.expected: The 2:30-2:48 script says VibeShield surfaces a static readiness checklist and does not imply those roadmap items are dynamic scanner output.

tests.name: legal findings are review indicators
tests.expected: Legal copy includes: Risk indicator for developer or legal review; not legal advice.

tests.name: timing is not fabricated
tests.expected: three_minute_timing_pass remains false until three real rehearsals are measured.

tests.name: no runtime conflict
tests.expected: No daemon is started, no npm or tsx command is run, and no node src/* command is run.
